title: DanTDM's Villager Lullaby
description: Adds DanTDM's custom music disc to Minecraft!
body:
DanTDM has recently created his own Music Disc, called "Villager Lullaby". So, I made it a mod! It can be crafted using 5 diamonds in the shape of a minecart, with a normal minecart in the center.

(All rights reserved to DanTDM. I am not affiliated with him, unfortunately.)
